BundleInfo.name: ChimeraX-EpitopeMapper
BundleInfo.Author: Sophia Greene
BundleInfo.Synopsis: A ChimeraX bundle for epitope mapping.
BundleInfo.Description: A ChimeraX bundle for epitope mapping, providing tools to identify and analyze potential epitopes on protein structures using spatial clustering and B-cell propensity scoring.

Classifiers.ChimeraXClassifier: ChimeraX :: Command :: epitope map :: Analysis :: Map epitopes on protein structures
